TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Wusincicibuhsiayu, title = Wusincicibuhsiayu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wusincicibuhsiayu} }

S.FORM: Masalipa:Infobox Television O Wusincicibuhsiayu(Holam: 無神之地不下雨, ira ko , Ikilis: Rainless Love in a Godless Land) cecay tilifi dorama i Taywan. Misanga' Pipahosoan to tilifi no Chunghwa ci ina to tilifi dorama. Mipasadak to 2017 a miheca saka 10 a folad saka 17 a romi'ad 9:00~10:30 dadaya. Mianingaya a patingso^ Sye Ten-ti /Tiyamacan:Cen Ci-chiaw 'Orad/Kakarayan: Fu Men-po Li Pu-hey /Salipatsip sapatrok: Fu Men-po
S.PHON: masaɾipa:info~ub~b~vo~ux təɾəb~visio~un o~u wo~u~usinʦiʦib~b~vo~u~uħsiajo~u~u(ħo~uɾam: *******, ira ko~u , ikiɾis: rainɾəss ɾo~ub~və in a *o~uɬ~ɮɾəss ɾanɬ~ɮ) ʦəʦaj tiɾifi ɬ~ɮo~urama i tajwan. misaŋaʡ pipaħo~uso~uan to~u tiɾifi no~u ʦħo~u~uŋħwa ʦi ina to~u tiɾifi ɬ~ɮo~urama. mipasaɬ~ɮak to~u **** a miħəʦa saka ** a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ *:**~**:** ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja. mianiŋaja a patiŋso~uʔ sjə tən-ti /tijamaʦan:ʦən ʦi-ʦħiaw ʡo~uraɬ~ɮ/kakarajan: fo~u~u mən-po~u ɾi po~u~u-ħəj /saɾipatsip sapatro~uk: fo~u~u mən-po~u
S.FORM: Masalipa:Infobox Television O Wusincicibuhsiayu(Holam: 無神之地不下雨, ira ko , Ikilis: Rainless Love in a Godless Land) cecay tilifi dorama i Taywan. Misanga' Pipahosoan to tilifi no Chunghwa ci ina to tilifi dorama. Mipasadak to 2017 a miheca saka 10 a folad saka 17 a romi'ad 9:00~10:30 dadaya. Mianingaya a patingso^ Sye Ten-ti /Tiyamacan:Cen Ci-chiaw 'Orad/Kakarayan: Fu Men-po Li Pu-hey /Salipatsip sapatrok: Fu Men-po
S.PHON: masaɾipa:info~ub~b~vo~ux təɾəb~visio~un o~u wo~u~usinʦiʦib~b~vo~u~uħsiajo~u~u(ħo~uɾam: *******, ira ko~u , ikiɾis: rainɾəss ɾo~ub~və in a *o~uɬ~ɮɾəss ɾanɬ~ɮ) ʦəʦaj tiɾifi ɬ~ɮo~urama i tajwan. misaŋaʡ pipaħo~uso~uan to~u tiɾifi no~u ʦħo~u~uŋħwa ʦi ina to~u tiɾifi ɬ~ɮo~urama. mipasaɬ~ɮak to~u **** a miħəʦa saka ** a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ *:**~**:** ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja. mianiŋaja a patiŋso~uʔ sjə tən-ti /tijamaʦan:ʦən ʦi-ʦħiaw ʡo~uraɬ~ɮ/kakarajan: fo~u~u mən-po~u ɾi po~u~u-ħəj /saɾipatsip sapatro~uk: fo~u~u mən-po~u
